template.title: Notion Fronting Starter
template.summary: Template-suggested Notion API/MCP fronting structure with reviewed capability candidates.
template.description: Starts a governed Notion fronting project from reviewed starter data. Verify backend operations, auth posture, and policy boundaries against the real integration before locking.
template.recommendedBrief: Create a governed ANIP fronting layer for Notion. Expose selected behavior-shaped capabilities instead of raw backend operations. Read operations must preserve actor-visible scope. Write-adjacent operations must prepare previews or require approval before downstream mutation.

documents.title: Notion governed fronting intent
documents.content:
# Notion Governed Fronting Intent

> Imported from starter template `notion-fronting-starter`. Treat this as draft guidance, not discovered truth.

Expose a governed Notion capability surface in front of native API or MCP-backed operations.

## Template-suggested capabilities
- notion.workspace.search_context: Search bounded Notion pages and databases without exposing raw workspace tools.
- notion.database.query_context: Query a bounded Notion database view with declared filters and return summarized context.
- notion.page.create.prepare: Prepare a Notion page creation preview under an explicit parent before creating anything.
- notion.page.update.prepare: Prepare a Notion page update preview for an explicit page without applying the update.
- notion.comment.prepare: Prepare a Notion page comment from supplied context without posting it.

## Governance posture
- Raw Notion tools are not exposed directly to agents.
- Reads return bounded actor-visible context.
- Write-adjacent actions prepare previews or require explicit approval before execution.
- Missing required inputs trigger clarification instead of guessing.

documents.title: Notion integration evidence
documents.content:
# Notion Integration Evidence Template

> Imported from starter template `notion-fronting-starter`. Verify every operation against your chosen native API/MCP source before locking.

Native API connection: NOTION_API_URL
MCP connection: NOTION_MCP_ENDPOINT

## Template-suggested backend operations
- notion.api.workspace_search_context: GET /notion/workspace_search_context
- notion.api.database_query_context: GET /notion/database_query_context
- notion.api.page_create_prepare: POST /notion/page_create_prepare
- notion.api.page_update_prepare: POST /notion/page_update_prepare
- notion.api.comment_prepare: POST /notion/comment_prepare

## Secret posture
- Studio stores secret references only; project exports must not contain tokens.
- Teams can implement either native API or MCP backend seams behind the same governed ANIP contract.

documents.title: Notion developer evidence
documents.content:
# Notion Developer Evidence

Imported from starter template `notion-fronting-starter`. This is developer-owned evidence for Studio Autopilot and generated-service review.

This document turns starter operations into explicit ANIP runtime governance and input-contract evidence. Review it against the real integration before publishing.

## Capability Evidence Summary

| capability_id | service_id | operation_type | side_effect_level | inputs | backend_operation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| notion.workspace.search_context | notion-fronting | read | read | 4 | notion.api.workspace_search_context |
| notion.database.query_context | notion-fronting | read | read | 4 | notion.api.database_query_context |
| notion.page.create.prepare | notion-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 4 | notion.api.page_create_prepare |
| notion.page.update.prepare | notion-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 4 | notion.api.page_update_prepare |
| notion.comment.prepare | notion-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 4 | notion.api.comment_prepare |

## Reviewed Developer Evidence

The starter also carries first-class `integration_fronting_capability_mapping` records. Use this document as readable developer evidence, not as the only machine-readable source.

### Runtime governance

| capability_id | execution_posture | intent_type | produces | does_not_produce |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| notion.workspace.search_context | read_only | read_only | content.summary, data.read | raw_data_export, system.mutation |
| notion.database.query_context | read_only | read_only | content.summary, data.read | raw_data_export, system.mutation |
| notion.page.create.prepare | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |
| notion.page.update.prepare | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |
| notion.comment.prepare | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |

### Input contracts

| capability_id | input | type | required | semantic_type | entity_reference |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| notion.workspace.search_context | workspace_scope | string | yes | workspace_scope | yes |
| notion.workspace.search_context | query | string | yes |  | no |
| notion.workspace.search_context | limit | integer | no |  | no |
| notion.workspace.search_context | backend_options | object | no | backend_options | no |
| notion.database.query_context | database_id | string | yes | database_ref | yes |
| notion.database.query_context | filter | string | no |  | no |
| notion.database.query_context | limit | integer | no |  | no |
| notion.database.query_context | backend_options | object | no | backend_options | no |
| notion.page.create.prepare | parent_id | string | yes | page_or_database_ref | yes |
| notion.page.create.prepare | title | string | yes |  | no |
| notion.page.create.prepare | content_summary | string | yes |  | no |
| notion.page.create.prepare | backend_options | object | no | backend_options | no |
| notion.page.update.prepare | page_id | string | yes | page_ref | yes |
| notion.page.update.prepare | change_summary | string | yes |  | no |
| notion.page.update.prepare | content_patch | string | no |  | no |
| notion.page.update.prepare | backend_options | object | no | backend_options | no |
| notion.comment.prepare | page_id | string | yes | page_ref | yes |
| notion.comment.prepare | comment_purpose | string | yes |  | no |
| notion.comment.prepare | context | string | yes |  | no |
| notion.comment.prepare | backend_options | object | no | backend_options | no |
